query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS saved_addresses (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  label VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  street_address TEXT NOT NULL,
  eircode VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  latitude DECIMAL(10, 7),
  longitude DECIMAL(10, 7),
  is_default BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX user_id_idx (user_id)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS saved_addresses (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  label VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  street_address TEXT NOT NULL,
  eircode VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  latitude DECIMAL(10, 7),
  longitude DECIMAL(10, 7),
  is_default BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX user_id_idx (user_id)
);
